form.sectionTitle: Complete the form. We build the direction.
form.sectionBody: A short brief helps us shape a premium business website built for Google visibility and conversion.
form.sectionAside: If you prefer to understand the process first, open the process page. It explains the entire workflow clearly.
form.title: Complete the form and we start the demo.
form.subtitle: Short brief. Clear direction. A premium website concept for your business, with no cost and no obligation.
stepDescriptions: Tell us who you are, where the business is based and what type of business it is.
We keep one clear contact for delivery and any required clarification.
Add the links that show how the business communicates online today.
Tell us what vibe, features and main action should be highlighted.
Upload images if you have them and submit the request with contact consent.
tips: If we need clarification, we follow up simply and without pressure.

labels.details: What style, features or vibe do you want?
labels.consent: I agree to be contacted for the delivery of the demo.

form.contactHint: The person who should receive the demo

placeholders.businessType: Example: restaurant, clinic, salon, local services
placeholders.details: Example: modern premium vibe, stronger booking flow, gallery, services, testimonials and clearer mobile hierarchy.

form.linksNote: If you do not have every link yet, just send what already exists.
form.detailsNote: Tell us what the visitor should feel on the site and what action matters most.
form.uploadSubtitle: You can upload up to 6 images. If you do not have them now, submit anyway.
form.uploadDrop: Drag files here or click to choose images.
form.uploadHint: PNG, JPG or WEBP. Maximum 6 files. No account, no login.
form.uploadLater: You can always send extra images later by email.
form.consentNote: Your data is used only to review the request and deliver the demo.
form.successBody: You will receive a confirmation email shortly. The demo arrives within 24h.
successSteps: We confirm the request by email.
We build the homepage demo and recommended structure.
We send the link and follow up on your preferred channel.

errors.details: Please share useful context, at least 20 characters.
errors.consent: We need your consent to deliver the demo.
errors.upload: You can upload up to 6 images.
errors.uploadConfig: Uploads are not configured yet. Add the Cloudinary env values.
errors.uploadFailed: One of the uploads failed. Please try again.
errors.submit: We could not send the request right now. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what data we collect through the form and how we use it to deliver the requested demo.

sections.title: What data we collect
sections.body: We collect the details submitted in the form: business information, contact data, public links, preferences and optional image uploads.

sections.title: How we use the data
sections.body: We use the data only to review the request, prepare the demo and send the promised materials. We do not sell data or use it for unsolicited campaigns.

sections.title: Storage and providers
sections.body: Data may be processed through technical providers such as Vercel, Resend and Cloudinary strictly for hosting, email delivery and image uploads.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: You can email hello@weberra.ro at any time to request access, correction or deletion of the submitted data.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.intro: This page summarizes the basic rules for requesting the free demo and any later collaboration with Weberra.

sections.title: Nature of the offer
sections.body: The free demo is a homepage concept and structure proposal. It is not the full delivery of a completed production website.

sections.title: Eligibility
sections.body: We may limit requests or refuse duplicate, incomplete or capacity-breaking submissions.

sections.title: Communication
sections.body: By submitting the form you agree to be contacted strictly for clarification and delivery of the requested demo.

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.body: The concept remains presentation material until a separate implementation or transfer agreement is signed.

demoPage.metaTitle: Free Website Demo for Businesses | Premium Web Design Romania
demoPage.metaDescription: Receive a premium website demo for your business, free within 24h. SEO-oriented concept, strategic structure and professional design for businesses in Romania.
demoPage.heroBadge: The process for getting a premium website for your business
demoPage.heroTitle: How to get a premium, Google-optimized website for free in 24h
demoPage.heroSubtitle: In 2026, the businesses that scale have a professional website. We show you exactly how we build a premium presentation website for your business with no cost and no obligation.
demoPage.heroCardOneBody: A business website built with clear structure, strategic messaging and the right foundation for stronger leads and better Google visibility.
demoPage.heroCardTwoBody: A premium presentation website instantly changes how your business is perceived and gives you a stronger base for scaling in 2026.
demoPage.heroVisualTitle: Add the first screen of the website demo here.
demoPage.heroVisualBody: Ideal for a restaurant website, clinic website, salon website or any business website in Romania.
demoPage.whatBadge: Website demo for businesses in Romania
demoPage.whatTitle: You do not just get a design. You get a direction for online growth.
demoPage.whatBody: The demo is built strategically to turn visitors into customers and position your business properly in Google.

whatCards.title: Homepage built for conversions
whatCards.body: Clear structure, strategic messaging and CTAs that generate real leads. Not just a beautiful site, but a website that sells.

whatCards.title: SEO-optimized structure
whatCards.body: Architecture planned for Google searches and local visibility. Whether you run a restaurant, clinic, salon or another business, your website needs to be discoverable.

whatCards.title: Premium design tailored to your brand
whatCards.body: Every business has a different vibe. The demo reflects your identity precisely modern, elegant, luxury or minimalist.

demoPage.whatCtaTitle: You complete the form. We build the direction.
demoPage.whatCtaBody: In two minutes you send the essentials. Within 24 hours you receive a website demo that can change how your business is perceived.
demoPage.whatVisualTitle: Add the main screenshot from the website demo here.
demoPage.whatVisualBody: It can be the hero section, the full homepage or a preview that shows the quality of the premium web design.
receives: A homepage built for conversions and lead generation
An SEO-oriented website structure for Google and local search
A premium web design direction tailored to your brand
A clear base for full website development and online growth
demoPage.processTitle: How we build the website demo for your business
demoPage.processIntro: A clear process focused on growth and conversion.
demoPage.processSideBody: We do not just sketch a layout. We think about how the website will perform in Google, how it will shape perception and how it will convert interest into leads.
demoPage.processVisualTitle: Add the workflow, delivered preview or a process screen here.
demoPage.processVisualBody: A clear visual helps the client understand how we move from brief to premium website demo.

processSteps.title: You send the essential information
processSteps.description: The business name, industry, city and core services. The details that define your online positioning.

processSteps.title: We review the market and SEO opportunities
processSteps.description: We identify how your website can appear in Google and attract relevant customers.

processSteps.title: We build the premium concept
processSteps.description: We create a strategic homepage structured for conversions and a stronger professional image.

processSteps.title: You receive the demo + implementation plan
processSteps.description: We send you the demo link and discuss the next steps for the full website build.

demoPage.needsTitle: What helps us build a site that brings in customers
demoPage.needsIntro: The better we understand your business, the more relevant the demo becomes for your industry and audience.
demoPage.needsVisualTitle: Add images, references or materials that help us understand the business.
demoPage.needsVisualBody: With clearer context, we can build an SEO-optimized website that fits your market and your audience far better.
needs: City and service area (essential for local SEO)
demoPage.briefVisualBody: The location, team, products or strong brand visuals help us shape a more convincing presentation website.
demoPage.whyTitle: Why a premium website makes the difference in 2026
demoPage.whyIntro: A well-built business website in Romania means more than design. It means credibility, control and better leads.

whyCards.title: More credibility
whyCards.description: Customers trust a business that looks professional, intentional and coherent online.

whyCards.title: More visibility
whyCards.description: An SEO-optimized website can attract relevant Google traffic, not just social media attention.

whyCards.title: More conversions
whyCards.description: The right messaging, structure and CTAs turn interest into appointments, bookings or qualified enquiries.
